div.h1: MS Queue Dequeue: Hazard Pointer Memory Safety

div.p: Dual Guard Requirement: Protects against concurrent reclamation of both the current head and the node being extracted.
CRITICAL: Once hp_release is called, 0x2000 is reclaimable. Data must be cached in a local variable FIRST.
SENTINEL [0x2000] (Promoted from Data) key: NULL | val: NULL
